title: Lessing & Sears Mini Park · SF Parks
content: ### Support this site! Love having a fast, usable SF Parks site? This project runs entirely on community support! Help keep the site running, updated, and ad-free. 1. Welcome to another SF Parks site! 4. Lessing & Sears Mini Park/. ### Address. Sickles and Sears San Francisco, CA 94112. Park Hours: 6 a.m. to 10 p.m. #### Features. Transformed by recent renovations, this little oasis in the Outer Mission offers a brand new tot play structure and many upgraded amenities. It’s also home to a beloved community garden. Report a maintenance or vandalism issue at this site.
